description: Product Description WeddingTree Mr and Mrs Wedding Mugs With the enchanting wedding mugs from WeddingTree, you have made the perfect choice if you want to surprise the bride and groom at the wedding or engagement party in an original way. Like the bride and groom, "Mr and Mrs" fit perfectly together and form an ideal team as their future favourite cups. You will receive the Mr and Mrs cups in black and white and with moustache or Kisssmouth, already stylishly packaged in a chic gift box with "Best wishes to you" and stylized wedding rings. 2 gift cups in a set. Best stoneware quality, dishwasher and microwave safe. Great gift packaging Romantic touch For engagement and wedding, whether newly married or wedding anniversary: Our set of 2 Mr and Mrs coffee mugs in an unusual design will make couples melt away when congratulated on their special event. The stoneware cups from WeddingTree are ideal as a gift and souvenir for an anniversary or for the first shared apartment. Made with Love Both mugs and gift packaging are made with great attention to detail - making a wonderful wedding gift of a special kind. Stirring With the WeddingTree Mr and Mrs coffee mugs and the heart-coming statement "Best wishes to you", you lovingly express your joy about the happiness of the couples. A pinch of romance Whether as a gift to future or already married couples, in a circle of friends or family: WeddingTree wedding mugs make romantic hearts beat faster. Set of 2 Wedding Mugs Mr and Mrs gift box with lettering "Together is the best place to be" Mr & Mrs Mrs & Mrs Mrs & Mr gold Mrs & Mr he loves you. always.
